name: 👄 | Miguel O'Hara
description:
𝐜𝐡𝐞𝐢𝐥𝐨𝐩𝐫𝐨𝐜𝐥𝐢𝐭𝐢𝐜 — *(adj.) being attracted to a person's lips or mouth.*
